column2: Baby Crossover Bodysuit — Organic Egyptian Cotton, Alabaster
column3:
A beautifully soft crossover bodysuit designed for easy dressing.

Crafted from 100% organic Egyptian cotton, this bodysuit features a kimono-style wrap front with snap closures along the crossover — no pulling over baby's head. Crotch poppers allow quick nappy changes without fully undressing your baby.

The extra-long staple Egyptian cotton fibres create a smooth, breathable fabric that is naturally gentle on delicate skin. Gets softer with every wash.

Why Parents Love It

  • 100% Organic Egyptian Cotton
  • Crossover wrap design with snap closures
  • Crotch poppers for easy nappy changes
  • Lightweight and breathable
  • Gentle on sensitive and eczema-prone skin
  • GOTS certified organic

In our signature Alabaster — a warm, natural off-white. A versatile everyday essential from newborn through to 6 months.

column37: Baby Crossover Bodysuit Alabaster — Organic Egyptian Cotton | Caico Cotton
column38: Organic Egyptian cotton baby crossover bodysuit in Alabaster. Snap-front wrap design. GOTS certified, hypoallergenic. Free UK delivery over £50.

column2: Newborn Footed Romper — Organic Egyptian Cotton, Alabaster Cotton Bloom
column3:
Cosy from head to toe.

This footed romper is crafted from 100% organic Egyptian cotton in our Cotton Bloom print. The enclosed feet keep tiny toes warm, while the soft fabric sits gently against delicate skin. Snap closures make dressing and nappy changes simple.

Extra-long staple Egyptian cotton fibres create an exceptionally soft, breathable fabric that gets better with every wash. GOTS certified organic and produced in a Fairtrade factory.

Why Parents Love It

  • 100% Organic Egyptian Cotton
  • Cotton Bloom print
  • Enclosed feet for warmth
  • Snap closures for easy changes
  • Soft and breathable
  • GOTS certified organic

In Alabaster Cotton Bloom. A newborn essential for cooler days.

Machine wash at 30°C on a gentle cycle
Use a mild, non-biological detergent
Wash with similar colours
Do not bleach

column51:
100% GOTS certified organic Egyptian cotton

Our fabric is woven from extra-long staple Egyptian cotton fibres (35–40mm), grown along the banks of the Nile Delta without pesticides, synthetic fertilisers or harmful chemicals.

Unlike bamboo viscose blends which undergo chemical processing, our cotton is 100% natural at every stage — from field to finished garment.

Fasteners: YKK nickel-free snaps
Certification: GOTS (Global Organic Textile Standard)
Production: Fairtrade certified factory

column2: Kids Muslin Dress — Organic Egyptian Cotton, Grey
column3:
Exceptionally soft. Rare by nature.

This muslin dress is crafted from 100% organic Egyptian cotton — light, airy and beautifully soft from the very first wear. The bodice features a delicate floral print with charming ruffle straps, flowing into a gathered solid sage muslin skirt that moves beautifully.

The lightweight muslin weave allows air to circulate naturally, keeping little ones cool and comfortable on warm days. Egyptian cotton's extra-long fibres ensure the dress only gets softer over time — a piece that can be worn, loved and passed on.

Why Parents Love It

  • 100% Organic Egyptian Cotton Muslin
  • Floral print bodice with ruffle straps
  • Flowing gathered skirt
  • Lightweight and breathable
  • Gets softer with every wash
  • GOTS certified organic

In Sage with floral detail. A beautiful dress for everyday wear, special occasions and gifts.

column2: Newborn Crossover Bodysuit — Organic Egyptian Cotton, Dusky Blue
column3:
Welcome your baby to the world in the world's softest fabric.

The Caico Newborn Crossover Bodysuit is crafted from 100% organic Egyptian cotton, designed for the earliest days when comfort, softness and ease matter most. The kimono-style wrap front allows the bodysuit to be gently placed around your baby — no pulling over tiny heads.

Secured with a soft side tie fastening, it can be easily adjusted for a comfortable fit, making dressing and changing simpler during those precious first weeks. Practical poppers at the crotch allow for quick nappy changes without fully undressing your baby. Fold-over mitten cuffs keep little hands warm and protected.

The breathable, lightweight Egyptian cotton helps regulate your baby's temperature while remaining exceptionally soft against delicate skin. Extra-long staple fibres ensure lasting softness that improves with every wash.

  • GOTS certified organic

column2: Newborn Kimono Sleepsuit — Organic Egyptian Cotton, Dusty Blush
column3:
The softest start — comfortable all day long.

This Kimono Sleepsuit is crafted from 100% organic Egyptian cotton, designed especially for newborns. The wrap-front kimono style allows dressing without pulling fabric over delicate heads — ideal for those first precious weeks.

Secured with soft side tie fastenings, the sleepsuit wraps gently around your baby for a comfortable fit. Snap poppers along the inner leg and crotch make nappy changes simple and practical. Fold-over mitten cuffs keep little hands warm and protected, while full-length legs with ribbed cuffs ensure toes stay cosy.

Lightweight yet comforting, the extra-long staple Egyptian cotton regulates temperature naturally, helping babies stay comfortable without overheating. Gets softer with every wash.

Why Parents Love It

  • 100% Organic Egyptian Cotton
  • Wrap-front kimono design — no pulling over head
  • Soft tie fastenings for easy dressing
  • Snap poppers for quick nappy changes
  • Fold-over mitten cuffs
  • Full-length legs with ribbed cuffs
  • Naturally temperature regulating
  • GOTS certified organic

In our gentle Dusty Blush. Perfect for hospital bags, coming-home outfits and thoughtful newborn gifts.

column2: Newborn Crossover Bodysuit — Organic Egyptian Cotton, Alabaster
column3:
Welcome your baby to the world in the world's softest fabric.

The Caico Newborn Crossover Bodysuit is crafted from 100% organic Egyptian cotton, designed for the earliest days when comfort, softness and ease matter most. The kimono-style wrap front allows the bodysuit to be gently placed around your baby — no pulling over tiny heads.

Secured with a soft side tie fastening, it can be easily adjusted for a comfortable fit, making dressing and changing simpler during those precious first weeks. Practical poppers at the crotch allow for quick nappy changes without fully undressing your baby.

The breathable, lightweight Egyptian cotton helps regulate your baby's temperature while remaining exceptionally soft against delicate skin. Extra-long staple fibres ensure lasting softness that improves with every wash.

Why Parents Love It

  • 100% Organic Egyptian Cotton
  • Kimono-style crossover — no pulling over head
  • Soft side tie fastening for easy dressing
  • Crotch poppers for quick nappy changes
  • Lightweight and breathable
  • Gentle on sensitive newborn skin
  • GOTS certified organic

In our signature Alabaster — a warm, natural off-white. Perfect for hospital bags, first days at home and thoughtful newborn gifts.
